examples: This will be the last time weever quote the Surgeon General.
Extraction yield of collagen from skin of bighead, weever and crucian was 11.9%, 11.3% and 11.6%, respectively, with acid.
Extraction yield of collagen from muscle of bighead, weever and crucian was 0.61%, 0.57% and 0.43%, respectively, by extraction of acid-soluble collagen with acid.
